CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), age INT);
SELECT name FROM users WHERE age = (SELECT age FROM users WHERE name = 'Bob');
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT users.name, SUM(orders.amount) AS total_amount FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id WHERE total_amount = 250.00 GROUP BY users.name;
CREATE TABLE products (product_id INT PRIMARY KEY, product_name VARCHAR(100), price DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO products VALUES (1, 'Product A', 100.00), (2, 'Product B', 150.00), (3, 'Product C', 100.00);
SELECT product_name FROM products WHERE price = (SELECT MIN(price) FROM products);
SELECT u.name FROM users u WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id AND o.amount = 250.00);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE age = (SELECT AVG(age) FROM users);
